name: TIRI
title: THE ARCHITECT

abilities.name: Core Resonance
abilities.text: Once per activation. When this model declares an action, it may draw range and LoS from a Lost Technology marker within 8".

abilities.name: Weight of Lost Souls
abilities.text: If this model is within 2" of another allied construct model, reduce damage dealt to this model by 1.

actions.name: Deconstruct
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action received a raise, damage from this action ignores (warding) abilities.

triggers.name: Defensive Reflexes
triggers.text: This model gains a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Sluggish Steps
triggers.text: Target gains a Slow token and this model may move it up to 3".

triggers.name: Arc
triggers.text: Once per activation. Declare this action again targeting a different model, drawing range and LoS from the original target.

actions.name: Pull of the Cage
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target allies. Choose either toward or away. Move the target up to 6" in the chosen direction from a Lost Technology marker in its LoS.

triggers.name: Restorative Current
triggers.text: Target gains this model's choice of either a Shielded or Staggered token.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

actions.name: Relics of the Old War
actions.effects: Make a Lost Technology marker within range.

triggers.name: Monument to Our Time
triggers.text: Summon an Unseelie Engine with 4 health anywhere within range.

triggers.name: Cruelty
triggers.text: Once per turn. Declare this action again.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='THE ARCHITECT' back='The Architect'
extraction_notes: Embrace Technology and Unseelie Engine abilities have no text visible on this card front - likely continued on back or reference other cards
